pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 25, 30; export_result.sh line 15; task description; verifier.py confirms exact name match required
setup_task.sh lines 71-72 and 75-76 create these documents with exact titles; both contain 'Acme Corp' in content and 'Agreement' in title; verifier.py lines 55-74 checks for exact matches

setup_task.sh lines 79-80 and 83-84 create these documents with exact titles; Acme Invoice has 'Acme Corp' but no 'Agreement' in title (line 79-80 comment: 'Content match but Title mismatch'); Beta Service Agreement has 'Agreement' but 'Beta Inc' not 'Acme Corp' (line 83-84 comment: 'Title match but Content mismatch')

privileged_info_summary: The task creates four synthetic documents in a Nuxeo Platform workspace: two target documents ('Acme Service Agreement' and 'Acme NDA Agreement') that meet both criteria (contain 'Agreement' in title AND 'Acme Corp' in content), and two distractor documents ('Acme Invoice 2023-001' and 'Beta Service Agreement') that each meet only one criterion. The task requires creating a collection named 'Legal Hold - Acme' and adding only the two target documents to it.
